tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
The rapid 1.1. _________ of industrial processes has transformed the world of work over the past century. While machines have long performed repetitive tasks, the latest wave of 1.2. _________ brought by artificial intelligence is far more profound. Economists warn that the pace of change could lead to significant 1.3. _________ in sectors where human labour is being replaced by algorithms and robots.

However, others argue that new technologies always generate new opportunities, and that 1.4. _________ will remain a uniquely human strength. Jobs that require 1.5. _________ workers — such as engineers, data analysts, and healthcare professionals — are growing rapidly, while routine jobs face the greatest risk of replacement.

The modern workplace also demands 1.6. _________, with many employees now working remotely or on non-traditional schedules. Companies that embrace 1.7. _________ tend to outperform their rivals, putting pressure on workers to constantly update their abilities. To remain 1.8. _________ in the job market, individuals must be willing to retrain and adapt throughout their careers.
